scripts.dev:all: dotenv -e .env -- concurrently -k "npm run --workspace @orgops/api dev" "npm run --workspace @orgops/ui dev" "npm run dev:runner:after-api"
scripts.dev:all:no-api: dotenv -e .env -- concurrently -k "npm run --workspace @orgops/ui dev" "npm run dev:runner:after-api"
scripts.prod:all: npm run build && dotenv -e .env -- concurrently -k "npm run --workspace @orgops/api start" "npm run --workspace @orgops/ui preview" "npm run prod:runner:after-api"
scripts.lint:all: npm run --workspace @orgops/api lint && npm run --workspace @orgops/agent-runner lint && npm run --workspace @orgops/opscli lint && npm run --workspace @orgops/ui lint && npm run --workspace @orgops/db lint && npm run --workspace @orgops/schemas lint && npm run --workspace @orgops/event-bus lint && npm run --workspace @orgops/llm lint && npm run --workspace @orgops/crypto lint && npm run --workspace @orgops/skills lint && npm run --workspace @orgops/events-scenario-tests lint
